---
title: "Notes"
subtitle: "学习笔记与数学随想"
listing:
  contents: notes
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, categories, date]
  grid-columns: 2
  page-size: 10
toc: false
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" icon=false}
这里收集了我在学习拓扑学过程中的笔记。内容涵盖量子拓扑、范畴论、3-流形不变量等主题。

笔记主要面向有代数拓扑背景的研究生，希望能对同样在学习这些内容的朋友有所帮助。
:::

---

## 主题分类

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .text-center .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### 🎯 量子不变量

Turaev-Viro, Reshetikhin-Turaev, Khovanov homology

[浏览 →](notes/turaev-viro.qmd)
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .text-center .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### 📐 范畴论

Tensor categories, fusion categories, modular categories

[即将更新]
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .text-center .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### 🔷 几何拓扑

Heegaard splittings, triangulations, handle theory

[即将更新]
:::
:::
:::

:::

---

## 所有笔记
